title: rubus cedrorum
intro: Rubus cedrorum, also known as the cedar-leaved raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus cedrorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus cedrorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams and preserves due to its edible fruits.
